statement.markdown: Implement a function that filters an array of integers and returns a new array containing only the elements that are greater than 10. The function should take two parameters: `arr` (the input array) and `x` (the threshold value).
statement.inputFormat: array of integers and an integer threshold value
statement.notes: This function should preserve the original order of elements.

examples.explanation: Filter the array and return elements greater than 10.
There are no elements greater than 6.

hints.text: Use a for loop to iterate through the array and push elements to a new array if they meet the condition.
